name: Stuck Worker Escalation Fix
goal: Fix three compounding bugs that allowed worker d1127 to sit at plan_ready for 499 minutes with no escalation — hash dedup suppressing check-ins, infinite liveness deferral, and missing Slack notifications.

tasks.name: Add constants, state variables, and cleanup scaffolding
tasks.description: Add PM_GATE_STAGES, PM_GATE_SLACK_SECONDS, MAX_LIVENESS_DEFERRALS constants; add _stuck_liveness_count and _pm_gate_slack_sent state vars in __init__; add cleanup entries in both cleanup sites and clear _pm_gate_slack_sent on stage change. No tests required: pure scaffolding.

steps.description: Add PM_GATE_STAGES, PM_GATE_SLACK_SECONDS, MAX_LIVENESS_DEFERRALS constants after line 106 (STALENESS_LIVENESS_EXTENSION)
Add _stuck_liveness_count and _pm_gate_slack_sent state variables in __init__ after _prompt_waiting_cache
Add _stuck_liveness_count cleanup in check_stuck_workers cleanup loop (after _stuck_kill_deferred.pop)
Add _stuck_liveness_count cleanup in _confirm_and_kill_stuck_worker final cleanup (after _stuck_kill_deferred.pop)
Clear _pm_gate_slack_sent on stage change in check_workers (inside 'if stage != last_seen' block)
Stage changes: git add commander/src/ironclaude/main.py

tasks.name: Add format_worker_gate_stuck_slack formatter
tasks.description: Add new Slack notification formatter for workers stuck at PM gate stages. TDD: write test first, verify fail, implement, verify pass.

steps.description: Add format_worker_gate_stuck_slack to import list and write TestWorkerGateStuckSlack test class in test_notifications.py
Run test to verify it fails (ImportError)
Implement format_worker_gate_stuck_slack in notifications.py after format_worker_checkin_slack
Run test to verify it passes
Stage changes: git add commander/src/ironclaude/notifications.py commander/tests/test_notifications.py

tasks.name: Fix Bug 1 — Hash dedup bypass for prompt-waiting workers
tasks.description: Move prompt_waiting detection above hash check, bypass hash dedup when prompt_waiting=True, add PM gate Slack escalation at >30 min. TDD: write tests first.

steps.description: Write TestHashDedupBypassPromptWaiting test class with 4 tests in test_daemon.py
Run tests to verify they fail
Move prompt_waiting detection above hash check in check_workers, add bypass when prompt_waiting=True, add PM gate Slack escalation after check-in
Run tests to verify they pass
Run existing hash dedup tests for regressions
Stage changes: git add commander/src/ironclaude/main.py commander/tests/test_daemon.py

tasks.name: Fix Bug 3 — Slack notification at stuck alert tier
tasks.description: Add Slack notification in check_stuck_workers alert path for prompt-waiting workers. TDD: write tests first.

steps.description: Write TestStuckWorkerSlackAlert test class with 2 tests in test_daemon.py
Run tests to verify they fail
Add Slack notification after Brain message in check_stuck_workers alert block when prompt_waiting=True
Run tests to verify they pass
Stage changes: git add commander/src/ironclaude/main.py commander/tests/test_daemon.py

tasks.name: Fix Bug 2 — Liveness deferral cap for prompt-waiting workers
tasks.description: Track and cap liveness deferrals at MAX_LIVENESS_DEFERRALS for prompt-waiting workers in _confirm_and_kill_stuck_worker. TDD: write tests first.

steps.description: Write TestLivenessDeferralCap test class with 4 tests in test_daemon.py
Run tests to verify they fail
Add deferral counter tracking and cap logic in _confirm_and_kill_stuck_worker liveness check
Run tests to verify they pass
Run full test suite for regressions
Stage changes: git add commander/src/ironclaude/main.py commander/tests/test_daemon.py
